name: view-mermaid
description: View Mermaid diagrams from the current conversation in a browser. Writes each chat mermaid block to a .mmd file and serves them rendered (bundled mermaid.js, fully offline) on a Tailscale-reachable HTTP server, with a diagram list, per-diagram fullscreen with zoom/pan, copyable source, and a light/dark toggle. Trigger with /view-mermaid.
